name: Tommy's Margarita

spec.method_detail: Shake hard with ice. Strain over fresh ice in rocks glass.

history: Julio Bermejo created this at Tommy's Mexican Restaurant in San Francisco around 1990. The innovation: replacing orange liqueur with agave nectar to highlight the 100% agave tequila. It's cleaner, more agave-forward, and drier. The IBA adopted it as an official cocktail. It's become the standard for how to evaluate tequila quality in a cocktail.
